H2: Business Magnet FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Business Magnets

Professional Magnetic Marketing Solutions for Your Brand

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size: Choose your business magnet dimensions Quantity: Select the number of magnets needed Production Time: 1-5 business days available Cut Type: Square cut, rounded corners, or die cut Upload Design: Add your business logo or artwork Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Business Magnets for Professional Marketing

Transform your marketing strategy with custom business magnets that keep your brand visible and accessible. These versatile promotional tools feature full-color printing on durable magnetic material, perfect for refrigerators, filing cabinets, vehicles, and any metal surface in offices, homes, or commercial spaces. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Our business magnets are constructed from high-quality flexible magnetic material with a protective laminate finish that ensures long-lasting durability and professional appearance. Whether you need promotional giveaways, service reminders, or brand awareness tools, these custom car magnets and magnetic marketing materials deliver consistent exposure for your business message.

Available in multiple sizes and cutting options, business magnets can be customized with your company logo, contact information, service offerings, or any marketing message. The strong magnetic backing ensures reliable adhesion to metal surfaces while remaining easy to remove and reposition as needed.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Business Magnets

Ordering your professional business magnets is straightforward through our streamlined design and approval process. Choose your preferred size, upload your artwork or design using our online tool, and receive a proof for approval before production begins.

Design Process

Create your business magnet design using our easy-to-use online designer by uploading your company logo or artwork. Alternatively, upload a print-ready file in .eps format to ensure the highest quality output. Our design interface supports various file types and provides real-time previews of your magnet design.

Payment

All business magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your order enters production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your business magnet order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order progress through every stage of production, from file processing to final delivery.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers turnaround times ranging from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the timeline that best fits your marketing needs and budget. Production time begins once your artwork is approved and payment is processed.

1 Business Day Priority Production

For urgent business magnet needs, our priority production option delivers completed orders within one business day. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available in special circumstances.

2 Business Days Express Production

The express production option provides quick turnaround for time-sensitive business magnet campaigns. This timeline works well for upcoming trade shows, promotional events, or marketing campaigns with moderate urgency.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option offers an ideal balance of speed and value for business magnet orders. This timeframe provides sufficient production time while maintaining competitive pricing for promotional magnet campaigns.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose the saver production option for cost-effective business magnet printing when timing is flexible. This option provides maximum value for larger quantity orders or planned marketing campaigns without rush requirements.

Note: Production time is separate from shipping time. Turnaround begins when file upload is complete and approved. Orders requiring prepress review or proof approval start production timing from approval confirmation.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for Business Magnets

Choose from three professional cutting options for your business magnets, each designed to meet different aesthetic and functional requirements. All magnetic signs include a protective laminate finish for enhanced durability and professional appearance.

Die Cut Business Magnets

Die cut magnets follow the exact outline of your design, creating custom shapes that match your logo or artwork. This option provides maximum visual impact and unique branding opportunities, perfect for distinctive business promotion and memorable marketing pieces.

Square Cut with Rounded Corners Business Magnets

The standard finishing option features clean square cuts with professionally rounded corners for a polished appearance. This classic format works well for most business applications, providing a professional look that complements any marketing message or company branding.

Square Cut Business Magnets

Sharp square cut edges create a clean, modern appearance for business magnets with traditional rectangular or square designs. This cutting option maximizes the printable area and provides crisp, professional edges suitable for corporate branding and promotional applications.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your business magnets print with professional quality and accurate colors. Follow these specifications to achieve optimal results for your magnetic marketing materials.

Preferred File Types

For best printing results, submit artwork in Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF format. These vector formats maintain crisp edges and accurate colors at any size. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during production.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for business magnet printing. Maximum file size is 100 MB. Ensure raster images meet resolution requirements: 100 DPI at full size, 200 DPI at 50% scale, or 300 DPI at 25% scale.

File Setup Tips

Set up artwork proportionate to your exact business magnet size order. Convert all text to outlines to ensure accurate font reproduction. Allow for bleed only when necessary, and never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Clearly indicate cut lines for all custom shapes.

Design Services

Professional vectorizing and recreation services are available for business logos and artwork that don't meet quality requirements. Most images can be recreated starting at $15, with detailed artwork subject to custom quoting. Save the date magnets and other specialized designs benefit from our professional design assistance.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Business Magnets

Business magnet orders ship quickly after production completion, with most deliveries arriving within 2-4 business days via standard shipping methods. Shipping time is calculated separately from production time to provide accurate delivery expectations.

Shipping Methods

We utilize reliable shipping carriers to ensure your business magnets arrive safely and on schedule. Standard shipping provides cost-effective delivery for most promotional campaigns, while expedited options are available for time-sensitive marketing needs.

Shipping Time Expectations

Expect your business magnet order to arrive within 2-4 business days after production is complete. This timeframe allows for proper packaging and carrier transit time to ensure your magnetic marketing materials reach you in perfect condition.

Important Shipping Notes

Shipping costs and transit times vary based on destination and order size. Business magnets are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transport. Track your shipment using the provided tracking information once your order ships from our facility.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet Installation & Application

Business magnets are designed for easy application and removal on ferrous metal surfaces. Proper installation ensures maximum magnetic adhesion and professional appearance for your promotional materials.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the metal surface thoroughly with a lint-free cloth to remove dust, grease, or debris. Ensure the surface is completely dry before applying your business magnet. Smooth, flat metal surfaces provide the strongest magnetic hold and best appearance.

Applying Business Magnets

Position the magnet carefully on the cleaned surface, starting from one edge and smoothing across to eliminate air bubbles. The flexible magnetic material conforms to slight surface variations while maintaining strong adhesion to ferrous metals like steel filing cabinets, refrigerators, and vehicle surfaces.

Removing and Repositioning

Business magnets can be easily removed and repositioned without leaving residue on metal surfaces. Gently lift from one corner and peel away slowly. Store removed magnets flat to maintain their shape and magnetic strength for future applications.

Compatible surfaces include refrigerators, filing cabinets, metal doors, vehicle surfaces, and any ferrous metal in offices, homes, or commercial environments. For optimal performance, avoid applying to painted surfaces that may scratch or surfaces exposed to extreme temperatures.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Business Magnets?

Business magnets are promotional marketing tools made from flexible magnetic material with full-color printing capabilities. These magnetic sheets feature a strong magnetic backing that adheres to ferrous metal surfaces, making them ideal for refrigerators, filing cabinets, vehicle doors, and office equipment. Business magnets serve as constant brand reminders, displaying company logos, contact information, services, and promotional messages in high-visibility locations where customers and prospects encounter them daily.

Design Your Professional Business Magnets Today

Create impactful magnetic marketing materials that keep your brand visible and accessible to customers. Our business magnets combine professional printing quality with durable magnetic backing, ensuring your promotional investment delivers long-term brand exposure and marketing value.

Choose from multiple sizes, cutting options, and fast production times to meet your promotional timeline and budget requirements. Whether you need promotional giveaways, service reminders, or ongoing brand awareness tools, custom business magnets provide versatile marketing solutions that work in offices, homes, and commercial environments.

Upload your artwork today and create magnetic marketing materials that strengthen your brand presence and customer connections. Professional custom photo magnets and specialized magnetic products are also available to complement your marketing strategy.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Magnet FAQs

What materials are business magnets made from?

Business magnets are constructed from flexible magnetic sheeting with a printable vinyl surface and protective laminate coating. This combination provides strong magnetic adhesion, vibrant full-color printing, and durability against normal wear and weather exposure.

What surfaces do business magnets stick to?

Business magnets adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel refrigerators, filing cabinets, metal doors, vehicle surfaces, and office equipment. They work best on smooth, flat metal surfaces and do not stick to aluminum, brass, copper, or non-metallic surfaces.

How long do business magnets last?

Quality business magnets typically last 3-5 years with normal indoor use and 1-2 years with outdoor exposure. The protective laminate coating helps resist fading, moisture, and scratching, while the magnetic backing maintains adhesion strength over time.

What is the minimum order quantity for business magnets?

Business magnet orders start at a minimum quantity of one piece, making them suitable for both small business needs and large promotional campaigns. Volume discounts are available for larger quantities.

Can business magnets be cut to custom shapes?

Yes, business magnets can be die cut to follow the outline of your design or logo. This creates unique custom shapes that enhance brand recognition and visual impact. Standard square and rounded corner options are also available.

Are business magnets waterproof?

Business magnets feature a protective laminate finish that provides water resistance for normal indoor and outdoor use. While they can withstand moisture exposure, they are not designed for submersion or extreme weather conditions.

What file format should I use for business magnet artwork?

Vector files in Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF format provide the best printing results for business magnets. High-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files are also accepted. Ensure all fonts are outlined and files meet resolution requirements for your magnet size.
